item.title: A quarter of a century!
item.description: At the start I struggled and never thought I'd make it through the first few weeks. Now here I am, 25 years later, healthy, happy and still sober. I thought my life was over when I had to stop drinking; in truth, it was only just starting.
item.dc:creator: jan27299

item.description: Source: https://www.instagram.com/reel/C3p7xr2vcr-/
item.dc:creator: Rammsteinstochter

item.title: M&M Vending machine error reveals secret face image database of college students ... Facial-recognition data is typically used to prompt more vending machine sales.
item.description: Canada-based University of Waterloo is racing to remove M&M-branded smart vending machines from campus after outraged students discovered the machines were covertly collecting facial-recognition data without their consent. The scandal started when a student using the alias SquidKid47 posted an image on Reddit showing a campus vending machine error message, "Invenda.Vending.FacialRecognitionApp.exe," displayed after the machine failed to launch a facial recognition application that nobody expected to be part of the process of using a vending machine. Stanley sounded the alarm after consulting Invenda sales brochures that promised "the machines are capable of sending estimated ages and genders" of every person who used the machines—without ever requesting their consent. This frustrated Stanley, who discovered that Canada's privacy commissioner had years ago investigated a shopping mall operator called Cadillac Fairview after discovering some of the malls' informational kiosks were secretly "using facial recognition software on unsuspecting patrons." Only because of that official investigation did Canadians learn that "over 5 million nonconsenting Canadians" were scanned into Cadillac Fairview's database, Stanley reported. Where Cadillac Fairview was ultimately forced to delete the entire database, Stanley wrote that consequences for collecting similarly sensitive facial recognition data without consent for Invenda clients like Mars remain unclear. Stanley's report ended with a call for students to demand that the university "bar facial recognition vending machines from campus." A University of Waterloo spokesperson, Rebecca Elming, eventually responded, confirming to CTV News that the school had asked to disable the vending machine software until the machines could be removed. Students told CTV News that their confidence in the university's administration was shaken by the controversy. Some students claimed on Reddit that they attempted to cover the vending machine cameras while waiting for the school to respond, using gum or Post-it notes. One student pondered whether "there are other places this technology could be being used" on campus. https://arstechnica.com/tech-policy/2024/02/vending-machine-error-reveals-secret-face-image-database-of-college-students/
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin

item.title: Out there making and ruining peoples' days

item.dc:creator: DropDrop

item.title: Yes Virginia, the tweet below is 100% real.
item.description: And as much as I don’t want to veer into a political discussion, the time of watching from the sidelines is officially over. I’ll give you one second and one guess as to which party no longer feels the need to hide their horrific, sub-intellectual, xenophobic, antisemitic, homophobic, anti-trans beliefs. They will whine, cry, and cheat to attain their goals, but in the end, common decency and critical thinking must prevail. We must stop their disgusting rhetoric of hatred now. We MUST vote every single one of them out office before it’s too late. Let’s call them out for their blind allegiance to a wannabe dictator. We must prevent them from passing more laws that restrict our democracy and the freedoms therein. The election is coming - vote them all out!
item.dc:creator: JamesWriting

item.title: Luscious Tuesday gaming memes (phone clearing dump)
item.description:
1
2. Damn good cosplay
3. Masterpiece
4. When you underestimate your enemy
5. The mod you always asked for but never had the courage to make
6. Normal players vs Speedrunners
7. "When you need to be there yesterday"
8. Me in Zombie Games
9
10
11
12. Using mods be like
13. When you realize you went in and done goofed
14. This is lucky cow. May it bring you cool CPUs and high frame rates
15. How?! P.S, And finally I want to thank the 2 (Hi, Mom!) people that made it to end of the dump. I wanted to share with you that as well as browsing and posting on Imgur all day I'm also making a passion project of mine. If you liked the humor in this dump I think you will like the game too called "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse). It is inspired by "The Stanley Parable" and similar in tone and features funny signs like this one here. Can you imagine? A first person game mixed with humor? https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ Anyway, It would mean the world to me and my brother if you checked the game out on Steam and gave it a wishlist. It won't disappoint. I promise. Just do not press the big red button, tho.
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Scream into the void
item.description: He was a good dog. Edit: Thank you for your kind words, for caring at all.
item.dc:creator: Sirdan3k

item.title: The Ancient Texts: A Phone Clearing Meme Dump pt-10
item.description:
Bienvenue mon amis. Part 10 already, how time flies. You're getting so big, are you excited for grade 5? Anyway, I had the above happen to me this weekend. Making friends in a new city. Always nerve-racking.
We are still in mid-2019 and it is still wild to me how many Vax memes I have from that period. It's like we all had a feeling something was coming.
The ship is now also on fire.
Started doing this a few years ago and the double takes alone are worth it.
I want to feel like I'm cutting calories and my dog always wants them. Cant give him too many tho, lil chonker.
These were the ingredients to make the spookiest little girls. But after ingredient X was added shit really took a turn.
She leyft meh rosyas buyhhh the stayirsssss
Anxiety has been giving me stomach issues lately. Just makes me more anxious!
Ever smash one of these bad boys? Satisfying and dangerous, don't do it.
The original design for the standard USB port was double sided like the USB-C but was decided against to save money.
Stay hydrated
It's a good list.
Think about doing this every time I start a new character but chicken out.
I don't get the appeal but you do you. No judgement.
Had a couple moments of this at the party I went to. Just gotta savour it.
Ban plastic bags. There I said it.
Thank you for coming with me on this journey. Please return carts to the cart return upon leaving. And remember, dont let the bastards grind you down.
item.dc:creator: WaywardJester

item.title: I found $1700
item.description: And I turned it into the police station. fast forward 90 days i go in to see if anyone has claimed it. And no one had. so you know what that means....NOTHING! Apparently the 90 day return policy to the person who turned it in is something only from tv shows and is not a real thing. Cause the police said they were keeping the money.
item.dc:creator: KingofRogues

item.title: My 15th favorite
item.description: Crossed-out the ones I have seen already, of the top of my head. Does anyone know if there's an updated list? This one's 4 year's old. Any movie I haven't seen yet but MUST be the next one? edit: Thanks for viral and I can't thank you all enough for the MANY MANY MANY tips you provided. I hope I was able to answer and upvote all of you by now. You're all great, even if we don't all have the same taste in movies.

item.title: Pant thief
item.description: Penny, the 4 month old feral farm kitten, is settling in just fine, little madam even nabbed my pants this morning, thankfully they were clean!!! **Edit** thanks everyone for making my pants so popular!! Penny, formerly Bambi, came from Cool for cats rehoming in Devon, they also have a cat cafe & boarding facilities, please check them out, they do great work! http://www.coolforcatscafe.co.uk/ The cardboard igloo came from Hobbycraft around Christmas 2022, although they don't seem to make that anymore, there is a wicked looking castle, Penny & Bonnie might be getting a new gift! https://www.hobbycraft.co.uk/colour-in-cardboard-castle-88cm/6602641000.html
item.dc:creator: CatsCatsCatsAndMoreCats

item.title: Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Day 197)
item.description:
Welcome to the 197th edition in this series, let's do some good today. Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Day 196) https://imgur.com/gallery/8cXisGQ Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Day 195) https://imgur.com/gallery/CCZXP4o Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Day 194) https://imgur.com/gallery/j8e1zRE Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Day 193) https://imgur.com/gallery/zUNZTnO Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Day 192) https://imgur.com/gallery/ef4CV1o Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Day 191) https://imgur.com/gallery/Cg6iteN Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Days 181-190) https://imgur.com/a/g3sTR0J Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Days 171-180) https://imgur.com/a/7OnodoA Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Days 161-170) https://imgur.com/a/3SfMNfg Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Days 151-160) https://imgur.com/a/a3npRvx Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Days 100-150) https://imgur.com/a/rdkioD9 Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (First 100 days) https://imgur.com/a/SGVY2vD
Read that one again with me.
He's a great comedian I found because we both have Tourettes If you like standup check him out!
It's a week later We're still celebrating
Football player Travis Kelce's mom
My mom always being so supportive This is the final post on the last day of Puckett Week!
Lean on the people you love and you'll never be alone. ... This is the very last post of Puckett Week, what an experience. One last day to send household items to domestic violence survivors staying at The Mary Parrish Center. You can also donate $18 for Nanna's 18th birthday! To donate $18 to abuse survivors in honor of Nanna's 18th birthday - https://www.maryparrish.org/donate ... If you'd like to send househokd supplies to the survivors of domestic violence at Mary Parrish - https://www.amazon.com/hz/wishlist/ls/3USHUHIVSINQE?ref_=wl_share ... Thank you all so much for upvoting the posts, donating to people in need and just being there for me when I need you most. The dogs and I will check back in when we're all settled again. Until then, be good to each other.
item.dc:creator: MrPuckett

item.title: Here are 20 dog gifs that I hope brighten your Tuesday

Welcome to the 238th installment in this series Here are 20 dog gifs that I hope brighten your Monday https://imgur.com/gallery/yy0PCpP Here are 20 dog gifs that I hope brighten your Wednesday https://imgur.com/gallery/t6ZW2l6 Here are 20 dog gifs that I hope brighten your Monday https://imgur.com/gallery/aUz0MVf Here are 20 dog gifs that I hope brighten your Friday https://imgur.com/gallery/3Pso3BD Here are 20 dog gifs that I hope brighten your Monday https://imgur.com/gallery/BVzmxMm Here are 20 dog gifs that I hope brighten your Wednesday https://imgur.com/gallery/2kUnb2J Here are 20 dog gifs that I hope brighten your Monday https://imgur.com/gallery/AE8TIbF Day 221-230 Here are 20 dog gifs that I hope brighten your day https://imgur.com/a/B81rJcL Days 211-220 Here are 20 dog gifs that I hope brighten your day https://imgur.com/a/lwhZE43 Days 201-210 Here are 20 dog gifs that I hope brighten your day https://imgur.com/a/fBko2Pg Fourth 50 links - Here are 20 dog gifs that I hope brighten your day https://imgur.com/a/Jtm8Lqz Third 50 links - Here are 20 dog gifs that I hope brighten your day https://imgur.com/a/XvE00DP Second 50 links - Here are 20 dog gifs that I hope brighten your day https://imgur.com/a/ewb2izC First 50 links - Here are 20 dog gifs that I hope brighten your day https://imgur.com/a/iqtNz8u

The next clip has music that some might find annoying
The next clip is way louder than the previous ones
The next clip is louder than the previous ones
My 8 year old, 18 year old, 8 year old and 4 year old puppies The Pucketts ... Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Day 197) https://imgur.com/gallery/KgqlsIO ... Today is the final day of Puckett Week! One last day to send household items to domestic violence survivors staying at The Mary Parrish Center. You can also donate $18 for Nanna's 18th birthday! To donate $18 to abuse survivors in honor of Nanna's 18th birthday - https://www.maryparrish.org/donate ... If you'd like to send househokd supplies to the survivors of domestic violence at Mary Parrish - https://www.amazon.com/hz/wishlist/ls/3USHUHIVSINQE?ref_=wl_share ... Thank you all so much for being a part of this, what an incredible week

I am horrified to find that you cannot pet Capybaras
All these people are going to a different event: * O' Brein: A funeral in London in 1941 * Bashir: An office in 1932 London. * Yates: A date in Cannes * Sisko: Going to dinner with the King of the UK, Emperor of Japan, and the Pope. * Kira: Date in a fancy restaurant in Paris. * Odo: Going to a Job Interview at a Law Firm * Dax: Rocky Horror picture show screening * Nog: Going to the proclamation of the Constitution of the People's Republic of China, 1954.

Do it
they are slimy

I say this to teenagers on the regular.

item.title: Let's see in a few years
item.dc:creator: SenkiAlfonz

item.title: Jon Stewart's dog died and he cried on air and it was really sad.
item.description:
I feel sad now too. Edit: Jon's sharing of his loss was a human moment that touched me. I sense this post might be perceived by some as mocking, which is not my intent. I think I could have done better with the title, which can't now be changed. Anywho. Thanks to everyone who commented with their own experiences. Our animals not only give us joy, but it seems they even connect us more profoundly with each other. What more can we ask?
This is his dog.
item.dc:creator: andydicktracymorganfairchild

item.description: I don't have much information on this and can't find another one like it online. It appears to have been made by the Indy Skateboard Company.

item.dc:creator: Ultraruben

item.title: joke's on you, I play Banana boys, I have 2+, 4++, and FnP 6+ against psychics MWs across the board, you cant hurt me with that bolter !
item.description: the numbers in the title were accurate in 8thed, now I have no idea. ok I've seen a comment asking wtf the title means and I don't need more to info-dump on y'all, so here's a brief explanation ! Warhammer 40000 is, aside from a fantastic meme machine, a wargame (think turn based strategy video game but on tabletop) were all the combat is six-sided dice (d6) based. The army that I play(ed, it's been a while), the Custodes, have a very golden (yes, even more than the rest of the Imperium, the human faction) color scheme, hence the nickname "Banana Boys". They are a elite army (they are very good individually but also very expensive to field, so instead of having 30-60 units, you have more like 10-15). In the game, each unit has stats. These stats are for the most part d6 based, like for example, if you want to fire at something you look at your Ballistic Skill, if it says 4+ that means that to hit you need to make 4 or more on a d6, before any modifiers. the Custodes, being OP, have 2+ in most of these. In the title I refer to the saves of the units, a stat that is used to see if the unit takes damage once it has been hit and wounded and that can be reduced by armor piercind (an AP -1 weapon makes a 4+ save into a 5+ save, etc). The Custodes troops have first a 2+ save, noted "2+". Then, they have an Invulnerable save, which is the same as a normal save but it cannot be reduced by armor piercing and that you can choose to use instead of your normal save, at 4+, noted "4++" And after that they have a FnP (meaning Feel no Pain, after a Space Marines rule, but don't worry about it) save that say "if you are hit by a psychic power (that normally deals Mortal Wounds, that cannot be saved), on a 6+, ignore it.", noted FnP 6+ or 6+++. You'll have noticed by now that wargames rules are a bit... dense. If you want to know more about the rules, go here : https://wahapedia.ru/ If you want to know more about WH40K in a memeful way, goes there : https://2d4chan.org/wiki/Warhammer_40,000
item.dc:creator: piconuke

item.title: meme
item.dc:creator: mortyc

item.title: Canadians, I give you Jagmeet Singh
item.description: Non-Canadians: Mr. Singh is the leader of the NDP a democratic socialist party in Canada that currently holds the balance of power in a parliamentary minority government. He'd be considered a threat to The Flag and a socialist to the far left of Bernie Sanders in the USA, but he's actually a rationalist who wants order and good government. ETA: original link went sideways. I'll try to find it, but in the meantime: https://www.msn.com/en-ca/news/canada/jagmeet-singh-vs-galen-weston-the-ndp-s-crusade-to-bring-down-corporate-greed/ar-BB1iH4G6
item.dc:creator: beergeek
